description_long: This is a modern, two-story police station building with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The facade features a combination of dark and beige exterior walls, with large horizontal windows on both floors allowing for ample natural light. The main entrance is set back under a covered area, and the building is surrounded by a paved driveway and parking area, with a police van parked in front. There are a few trees and landscaped elements integrated into the property, providing a touch of greenery. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with metal accents likely used for window frames and doors.
description: A modern, two-story police station with large windows, a flat roof, and a mix of dark and beige facades, set on a paved lot with landscaping and a police van parked in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, a police van parked on the driveway, and landscaping with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the beige wall with minimal windows, a tree, and the paved lot extending to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more large windows, the flat roof, and a tree in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark facade, a secondary entrance or garage, and a vehicle parked on the lot.
attribute_police_vehicle_presence: A white police van is parked in front of the building, visible in views 0 and 3, distinguished by its size and location near the entrance.
attribute_building_facade_features: Large horizontal windows, flat roof, recessed main entrance, dark and beige wall sections, paved driveway, garage door, and minimal decorative elements.
